subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali, O thou who gazest upon My countenance! The servant who standeth before Me hath presented thy letter at a time when trials have encompassed Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی یا ایها الناظر الی وجهی قد عرض العبد الحاضر کتابک فی حین احاطتنی
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prophecy and fulfillment
